markets.question: UFC Fight Night: Sam Hughes vs. Piera Rodriguez (Women's Strawweight, Prelims)
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Sam Hughes" if Sam Hughes is officially declared the winner of the fight against Piera Rodriguez at UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos, scheduled for March 14, 2026.

It will resolve to "Piera Rodriguez" if Piera Rodriguez is officially declared the winner.

If the fight is declared a draw or technical draw, ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond March 28, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

events.title: UFC Fight Night: Sam Hughes vs. Piera Rodriguez (Women's Strawweight, Prelims)
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Sam Hughes" if Sam Hughes is officially declared the winner of the fight against Piera Rodriguez at UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos, scheduled for March 14, 2026.

It will resolve to "Piera Rodriguez" if Piera Rodriguez is officially declared the winner.

If the fight is declared a draw or technical draw, ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond March 28, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

markets.question: Fight to Go the Distance?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the fight between Sam Hughes and Piera Rodriguez at UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos, scheduled for March 14, 2026, goes the full scheduled number of rounds and the result is determined by the judges' scorecards. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No." 

Draws decided by the judges' scorecards after all scheduled rounds are completed will resolve "Yes." Technical decisions or technical draws declared before all rounds are completed will resolve "No."

If the bout is ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond March 28, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

markets.question: Will the fight be won by KO or TKO?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the fight between Sam Hughes and Piera Rodriguez at UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos, scheduled for March 14, 2026, ends by KO or TKO, including referee stoppage, doctor stoppage, or corner stoppage. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No."

If the fight ends in a draw or by disqualification (either fighter), it will resolve "No."

If the bout is ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond March 28, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

markets.question: O/U 0.5 Rounds
markets.description:
Each market will resolve to “Over” if the fight between Sam Hughes and Piera Rodriguez at UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos, scheduled for March 14, 2026, lasts beyond the listed round threshold.

Each market will resolve to “Under” if the fight between Sam Hughes and Piera Rodriguez at UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos, scheduled for March 14, 2026, does not last beyond the listed round threshold.

For example:

“Over 0.5 Rounds” will resolve “Yes” if the fight continues past the 2:30 mark of Round 1.

“Under 0.5 Rounds” will resolve “Yes” if the fight ends before the 2:30 mark of Round 1.

If the fight ends exactly at the threshold (e.g., 2:30 of Round 1 for a 0.5 line), it will resolve “50-50.”

If the bout is not scored, postponed beyond March 28, 2026, or canceled, all options will resolve “50-50.”

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

If the bout is ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond March 28, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

events.description:
This market will resolve to "SuYoung You" if SuYoung You is officially declared the winner of the fight against Elijah Smith at UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos, scheduled for March 14, 2026.

It will resolve to "Elijah Smith" if Elijah Smith is officially declared the winner.

If the fight is declared a draw or technical draw, ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond March 28, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

markets.question: O/U 0.5 Rounds
markets.description:
Each market will resolve to “Over” if the fight between SuYoung You and Elijah Smith at UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos, scheduled for March 14, 2026, lasts beyond the listed round threshold.

Each market will resolve to “Under” if the fight between SuYoung You and Elijah Smith at UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos, scheduled for March 14, 2026, does not last beyond the listed round threshold.

For example:

“Over 0.5 Rounds” will resolve “Yes” if the fight continues past the 2:30 mark of Round 1.

“Under 0.5 Rounds” will resolve “Yes” if the fight ends before the 2:30 mark of Round 1.

If the fight ends exactly at the threshold (e.g., 2:30 of Round 1 for a 0.5 line), it will resolve “50-50.”

If the bout is not scored, postponed beyond March 28, 2026, or canceled, all options will resolve “50-50.”

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.
